title: Customer.io Track API keys should not be disclosed
description: In most cases, trust boundaries are violated when a secret is exposed in a source code repository or an uncontrolled deployment environment. Unintended people who don’t need to know the secret might get access to it. They might then be able to use it to gain unwanted access to associated services or resources.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

compliant.description: Using environment variables for Customer.io track credentials
compliant.code:
import os
import requests

# Load Customer.io track credentials from environment
CUSTOMERIO_TRACK_KEY = os.environ.get('CUSTOMERIO_TRACK_API_KEY')
CUSTOMERIO_SITE_ID = os.environ.get('CUSTOMERIO_SITE_ID')

response = requests.put(
    'https://track.customer.io/api/v1/customers/123',
    headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {CUSTOMERIO_TRACK_KEY}'}
)

compliant.description: Using environment variables in JavaScript for tracking
